roadmap_items: Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - version fallback debug metadata so fallback cards carry an explicit contract marker.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - keep fallback assertions synchronized with the versioned fallback debug payload.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - keep fallback consumers aligned with the contract version recorded in debug metadata.
scope_goal: Version fallback card debug metadata in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py and keep the contract assertions aligned with the versioned fallback debug payload.
tasks_completed: Added contract_version: 2 to the fallback debug metadata built in src/qual/ui/a2ui.py for both generic and unknown fallback cards.
Updated tests/unit/test_a2ui_contract.py to assert the versioned fallback debug payload in the generic and unknown fallback paths.
Rewrote the lane metadata to match the actual fallback debug metadata versioning change and its contract assertions.
Kept the lane record scoped to one source file plus matching tests with no routing or provider impact.
vision_capabilities: Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI) - fallback cards now expose versioned debug metadata as part of the user-facing protocol.
Capability 4: Operator-first control surface - fallback consumers can rely on an explicit debug contract version when reading card metadata.
